title: Campium diversifolium
taxonomy: Campium diversifolium is classified as a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It belongs to the genus Campium, which contains several species of epiphytic ferns. Campium diversifolium is native to tropical Asia and is often found growing on trees in shaded areas. The classification of Campium diversifolium is further supported by its distinctive frond morphology and reproductive structures. At the species level, Campium diversifolium is considered a distinct species due to its unique characteristics.
